sso.summary: SAML SSO for Organizations and Enterprise Cloud; OIDC for Enterprise Managed Users (recommended, supports Conditional Access). Enterprise-tier feature.

citations.title: About Enterprise Managed Users — GitHub Docs

ulm.summary: SCIM provisioning/deprovisioning for Enterprise Managed Users and SAML-enabled orgs via the IdP.

citations.title: Configuring SCIM provisioning for Enterprise Managed Users — GitHub Docs

entitlements.summary: Team membership syncs from IdP groups via a daily reconciliation job (Enterprise); fine-grained repository permissions are managed in-product, not via the IdP.

citations.title: Managing team memberships with IdP groups — GitHub Docs

riskSignals.summary: No documented CAEP / Shared Signals transmitter or receiver as of 2026-06. OIDC EMU supports IdP Conditional Access, but that is an IdP control, not a Shared Signals integration.

logout.summary: SSO session revocation and forced re-auth on Enterprise; OIDC EMU integrates with IdP Conditional Access. No documented back-channel Single Logout.

citations.title: About Enterprise Managed Users — GitHub Docs

tokenRevocation.summary: OAuth app token revocation via the REST API and PAT/token management; secret scanning can auto-revoke leaked tokens.

citations.title: OAuth applications REST API — GitHub Docs
